VP1_interrupt.evidence: SDK returns subtype:error_during_execution on interrupt. VP expects no error and session stays alive.

VP2_context_usage.evidence: totalTokens:30117, maxTokens:1000000, percentage:3, categories array with 10 entries, model:claude-opus-4-6[1m]

VP3_set_model.evidence: set-model to claude-haiku-4-6 accepted, no error, session completed with subtype:success

VP4_rewind_files.evidence: Session completes after first turn (result event, query nulled). Rewind sent after result has no active Query. Multi-turn session pattern not supported.

VP5_session_state_changed.evidence: No session_state_changed events received despite forwarding code at claude.ts:404-411. SDK may not emit these in default permission mode.

VP6_fork_session.evidence: Fork API returns valid session_id (dcc5c887). But forked session not found in listing. listSdkSessions may not discover forked sessions.

VP7_rename_tag.evidence: PATCH returns {ok:true}. But session list doesn't include summary/tag fields.

VP8_permission_flow.evidence: permission_request received for Write tool. permission-response allow sent, tool executed (result:success). No file_changed event from PostToolUse hook.

VP9_thinking_effort.evidence: Session started with thinking:{type:adaptive} and effort:high. No errors. Session completed with subtype:success.

VP1_claude_e2e.evidence: session.init with model claude-opus-4-6[1m] + 58 tools. assistant events received. result subtype:success duration_ms:44480 is_error:false.

VP2_codex_e2e.evidence: OPENAI_API_KEY not set. Codex CLI installed but cannot run without API key.

VP3_opencode_e2e.evidence: opencode CLI not installed, sidecar not running.

VP4_capabilities.evidence: 3 agents returned: claude (available:true), codex (available:false), opencode (available:false). Correct supportedCommands for each.

VP5_unknown_agent.evidence: Error message matches spec exactly: Agent "unknown" is not available. Available agents: claude, codex, opencode

VP1_ai_elements_build.evidence: Build: dist/index.js 156.72KB, dist/index.d.ts 63.42KB. Typecheck: 6/6 passed, no errors.

VP2_session_do_relay.evidence: SessionDO relay works: session spawns via UI, runs to completion (status updates in sidebar: running->completed, 2 turns). Gateway events not rendered in ChatThread — shows 'No messages yet'. Relay of status works, content event rendering needs investigation.

VP3_gate_resolution.evidence: No gate triggered during test session. Needs a prompt that triggers tool approval.

VP4_ui_renders.evidence: Step 1 PASS: Dashboard with project list (baseplane 28 sessions), sidebar with status/turns/time. Step 2 PASS: SpawnAgentForm with project, model, prompt — session spawns. Step 4 PARTIAL: Session completes but ChatThread shows 'No messages yet' — gateway events not reaching client.

VP5_session_persistence.evidence: Session creation works, sidebar shows sessions. But ChatThread content not rendering — cannot fully verify persistence of message content.

VP6_reconnect_resilience.evidence: Session lifecycle works but content display doesn't — cannot verify reconnect shows resumed content.

VP7_deleted_code.evidence: All 3 files absent: chat-view.tsx, ws-chat-transport.ts, message-parts/. Typecheck passes.

fixes_applied.fix: Added agents() vite plugin for @callable() decorator transformation
fixes_applied.root_cause: Wrangler dev bundle emitted raw @callable() decorators as invalid JS syntax

fixes_applied.fix: Added onRequest() handler for POST /create that delegates to @callable spawn()
fixes_applied.root_cause: API route fetched /create on DO but no HTTP handler existed (only WS RPC)
Origin mismatch between browser (localhost) and auth config (127.0.0.1)

fixes_applied.fix: Function-based trustedOrigins that includes request's rewritten origin header
fixes_applied.root_cause: wrangler dev rewrites Origin header to [[routes]] custom_domain (duraclaw.codevibesmatter.com), causing Better Auth CSRF rejection even for same-origin requests from localhost

known_gaps: Multi-turn session lifecycle: stream-input between turns not implemented; rewind requires active Query
Session listing doesn't return summary/tag fields from SDK sessions
Fork creates session but listing doesn't discover it
PostToolUse hook file_changed event not emitting (may be SDK timing issue)
session_state_changed events not received from SDK in default permission mode
ChatThread shows 'No messages yet' despite session completing — gateway events not reaching client-side rendering
